name: Rogue Outcast 2 Hybrid
comment: Rogue Outcast 2 Hybrid is a rugged IP65-rated Spot/Beam/Wash moving head with a lightweight alloy body housing a sophisticated optical system that delivers incredible brightness and a refined linear zoom that smoothly spans an expansive range of narrow to wide beam angles in every mode. The intense output of its 400W 6500K lamp can be precisely focused to project sharp midair beams and perfectly crisp spots or subtly softened with its frost and beam flattening features. Create stunning looks with dual gobo wheels and layerable prisms or shape luscious color washes with this versatile Outcast.

capabilities.comment: Fast Close  Slow Open S > F - Strobe Pulse Open
Slow Close  Fast Open S > F - Strobe Pulse Closed
Pulse Random S > F - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe Random S > F - Strobe Random
BO During Col Wheel Moving On - Blackout
BO During Col Wheel Moving Off - Blackout
BO During Gobo Wheel Moving On - Blackout
BO During Gobo Wheel Moving Off - Blackout
BO All Func During P/T - Blackout
BO All Func During P/T Off - Blackout
